name_en: 5BC125: MiuMiu new MiuWander handbag, featuring classic brand signature Matelasse embroidery on imported lambskin, retro matte hardware, utilizing curved lines to retain a playful feel, the overall bag shape is structured and full of personality, sweet yet chic, good capacity, almost everyone has one among fashion bloggers, many colors available, dimensions: 20 X 17 X 6, comes with original packaging
